# Spec 149 Slice 1 — vision-goals baseline (auto-generated 2026-06-11).

# gates on REGRESSION only. Backfill is a follow-up — when a baseline
# entry gains valid `vision_goals:`, `check-vision-goals` will surface
# it as 'shrinkable' and the author removes the line from here.
# Generated by: python -m scripts.check_vision_goals --root Plan
